themeVariables.fontFamily: IBM Plex Sans Condensed, Bahnschrift Condensed, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

themeCSS: .node rect,.node circle,.node ellipse,.node polygon,.node path,.label-container{rx:14px!important;ry:14px!important;} .cluster rect{rx:18px!important;ry:18px!important;} .cluster text,.nodeLabel,.edgeLabel{font-weight:600;} .edgeLabel rect,.labelBkg{fill:#FFFDF9!important;stroke:#515860!important;stroke-width:1px!important;} .flowchart-link,.edgePath path{stroke:#626A72!important;stroke-width:1.8px!important;} .marker path{fill:#626A72!important;stroke:#626A72!important;} .cluster span,.nodeLabel p{line-height:1.3!important;}
